name: craftWoodenTool
description: Crafts and equips a wooden tool (axe, pickaxe, shovel, etc.) from logs.

parameters.toolType: Type of wooden tool to craft (axe, pickaxe, shovel, hoe, sword). Default: 'axe'
parameters.logType: Type of log to use (e.g. 'oak_log', 'acacia_log'). Default: 'acacia_log'
parameters.quantity: Number of tools to craft. Default: 1

preconditions: Must have access to trees of the specified log type
